{{Item
| image = giant_stick.png
| id = broomstick
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Broomstick''' is a non-dyeable equipable item that makes your dog look like a mop.

Sadly, the model for the Puli was lost so we can't fix the stick so as to fit with the other dogs...
[[File:Broomstick_display.png|none|thumb|600x600px|Best used for Hungarian Pulis!]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Glass Pane <br>+ Bamboo<br> + Iron Ingot
| [[File:Broomstick_crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.17.0.
* It was used to be called Giant Stick but a lot of people confused this with the regular Stick so the name was changed.
